Cell phenotyping - Why our current approach does not work

Cell phenotyping - CellTune

2. XGBoost and CatBoost training

Bussi, et al. CellTune: An integrative software to expedite accurate cell classification in spatial proteomics. bioRxiv (2025).

SpaceStat - identification of interaction hubs

Immune system isn’t just a collection of independent cells; it’s a dynamic, interconnected network of interactions

Create a network for each single cell type & identify hubs

1

2

Hubs - nodes in network with a high number of connections within a defined distance -> critical regulators and transmitters of immune information

Overlap selected single-cell hubs and identify interaction hubs

3

Interaction hub (combined single-cell hubs) integrates multiple signals at once and reveals mechanism of immune information flow

Dataset of interaction hubs 
per sample

Next steps - integration of interaction hubs and GeoMx ROIs
